name: Elemental HERO Magma Neos
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｅ・ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エレメンタルヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> マグマ・ネオス
desc:
"Elemental HERO Neos" + "Neo-Spacian Flare Scarab" + "Neo-Spacian Grand Mole"
Must first be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by shuffling the above cards you control into the Deck. (You do not use "Polymerization".) This card gains 400 ATK for each card on the field. Once per turn, during the End Phase: Shuffle this card into the Extra Deck. If this card is shuffled into the Extra Deck this way: Return all cards on the field to the hand.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack

action: Returns Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion to Deck
Returns from field to Deck for Summon
Returns itself from field to Extra Deck
summoning: Requires only specific monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Normal Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
